reasoning: Even during the severe military escalation in May 2025—which involved cross-border airstrikes and missile attacks described as the most intense clash since 1971—neither India nor Pakistan issued a formal declaration of war. In modern international relations, states actively avoid formal war declarations due to their legal consequences under the UN Charter and international law. Although India suspended the Indus Waters Treaty (previously labeled an 'act of war' by Pakistan), no formal declarations ensued, and an uneasy ceasefire has held from May 10 up to the late October 2025 cutoff date. With only two months remaining in 2025, the likelihood of a new escalation triggering an explicitly formal declaration is negligible.
batch_queries: Will India and Pakistan go to war in 2025?
